title: VR Pack
description: It's VR Minecraft but yes, so play it NOW! plz...
body: It's pretty much a pack for minecraft that lets you play VR on it, with various other things, like new foods, vertical slabs, and the ability to put banners on your head. This modpack was made to run on ANY high quality PC. So if you have a literal POTATO PC... srry... Also you need Steam, and SteamVR to use it.
